perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black top stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a large boxed set of BARK pet toys. She smiles broadly and gestures toward the product. (2) The camera zooms in on the box, which contains plush toys shaped like a pizza, a cookie, a hot dog, and a soda cup. A second person's hand enters the frame to point out the textures and features of the toys. (3) The woman holds up a small 'Costco Membership' card designed for dogs that comes with the set. (4) Close-up shots show the woman squeezing the plush toys to demonstrate their softness and functionality while interacting with the off-camera person. (5) The woman concludes the segment by looking at the camera, nodding, and eventually putting the box in a shopping cart.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched female voice speaks excitedly with a friendly tone. (2) A male voice joins the conversation, speaking in a steady and descriptive manner about the product's details. (3) Squeaking sound effects are heard as the plush toys are squeezed. High-pitched 'ding' and 'sparkle' SFX occur during transitions or when specific text appears. (4) The music remains consistent in volume and tempo throughout the dialogue, with the vocals remaining at a high-level intensity until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and '549元超值買!' (Functional: Brand name and price hook). (2) '寵物版好市多黑卡會員組' (Functional: Product name - Pet version Costco Black Card Member Set). (3) '汪汪探險隊' (Decorative: Variety-show style group name). (4) '做的超可愛' (Decorative: Expressing emotion - 'Made so cute'). (5) '刺刺球' and '冰塊' (Functional: Identifying internal toy features). (6) '放回去!' (Decorative/Hook: Comedic directive at the end - 'Put it back!').

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Detail Showcase -> Discussion on Features and Price -> Decision to Buy

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 set of male hands appearing from the camera operator's position.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian female with long dark hair, wearing a black top with a shoulder cutout and large silver earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large industrial shelves filled with various wholesale products typical of a Costco warehouse.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Value Evaluation -> Closing Banter
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic product recommendation for a BARK brand pet toy set sold at Costco. By combining close-up visual demonstrations of the toys' textures and hidden features with a lively discussion about the set's value-for-money, the content aims to influence pet owners to purchase the product during their next shopping trip.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on one specific product, mentions the price clearly as a 'great deal', and provides a detailed demonstration of its features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and a conversational style between the host and the camera operator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media 'shopping find' format common in the Taiwanese creator community, characterized by fast cuts and high energy.
